subject: Invitation to Share Your Project
body:
Hi there,

I came across your post titled "Show HN: A reproducible harness for catching agent-eval cheating" on Hacker News. I'm interested in learning more about your project and any materials you might have available.

If you're open to it, I would love for you to share more details or an application. 

Best regards,

[Your Name]  
Pre-seed AI Infra
